Class Pret

java.lang.Object
models.Pret
public class Pret extends Object
This class represents a loan in the database. It contains the loan's ID, date of borrowing, duration of the loan, effective return date, the book being borrowed, and the user who borrowed it.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Loris

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors

    Description
    Pret(int id, Date dateEmprunt, int dureeEmprunt, LocalDate dateRetourEffective, Livre livre, Usager usager)
    Constructor to create a Loan object with the specified ID, date of borrowing, duration of the loan, effective return date, book, and user.

  • Constructor Details

    • Pret

      public Pret(int id, Date dateEmprunt, int dureeEmprunt, LocalDate dateRetourEffective, Livre livre, Usager usager)
      Constructor to create a Loan object with the specified ID, date of borrowing, duration of the loan, effective return date, book, and user.
      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier for the loan
      dateEmprunt - the date when the book was borrowed
      dureeEmprunt - the duration of the loan in days
      dateRetourEffective - the actual return date of the book
      livre - the book being borrowed
      usager - the user who borrowed the book

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public int getId()
      Gets the unique identifier of the loan.
      Returns:
      the ID of the loan

    • setId

      public void setId(int id)
      Set the unique identifier of the loan.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID to set for the loan

      public Date getDateEmprunt()
      Gets the date when the book was borrowed.

      the date of borrowing

      public void setDateEmprunt(Date dateEmprunt)
      Set the date when the book was borrowed.
      Parameters:
      dateEmprunt - the date to set for the borrowing

    • getDureeEmprunt

      public int getDureeEmprunt()
      Gets the duration of the loan in days.

      the duration of the loan

      public void setDureeEmprunt(int dureeEmprunt)
      Set the duration of the loan in days.
      Parameters:
      dureeEmprunt - the duration to set for the loan

      public LocalDate getDateRetourEffective()
      Gets the actual return date of the book.
      Returns:
      the effective return date

    • setDateRetourEffective

      public void setDateRetourEffective(LocalDate dateRetourEffective)
      Set the actual return date of the book.
      Parameters:
      dateRetourEffective - the date to set for the effective return

    • getLivre

      Gets the book being borrowed.
      Returns:
      the book being borrowed

      Set the book being borrowed.

      livre - the book to set for the loan

      Gets the user who borrowed the book.
      Returns:
      the user who borrowed the book

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of the loan.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
